issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (main card ability), not 'Activated' (reserved for activated abilities with costs)
Missing condition: opponent must have 4 or more Life cards. Requires 'HasCardOnBoard' equivalent for opponent life or custom condition check

Action type 'RemoveLife' is incorrect. Card effect is to 'trash...from...Life cards' (send to trash), not remove life total. Should use 'ForceDiscard' targeting opponent's life deck, or custom trash action
Count should reflect 'up to 1' (optional), may need 'optional':true modifier

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] If your opponent has 4 or more Life cards, trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.
